name: Code blocks — CRISPRO_REPO_ARCHITECTURE_REPORT.md
what_it_solves: Index of every fenced code block in '/mnt/results/CRISPRO_REPO_ARCHITECTURE_REPORT.md'.
how_it_solves: Extracted with `RE_CODE_BLOCK`; each block carries language, starting line, byte count, and a 400-char preview.
why_it_exists: Reports embed code snippets that are load-bearing (e.g. class definitions, config JSON); this makes them addressable without re-reading the parent file.

blocks.preview:
crispro-backend-v2/
├── api/                          # FastAPI application (primary)
│   ├── main.py                   # App factory + 40+ router registrations
│   ├── config.py                 # Env config, model routing, feature flags
│   ├── routers/                  # 40+ endpoint modules
│   ├── services/                 # Business logic (100+ service modules)
│   ├── schemas/

brenus_diligence/
├── guardrails/
│   └── brenus_flags.py          # Flag enforcement engine (SLICE-003)
├── receipts/
│   └── receipt_brenus.py        # Receipt generation for Brenus outputs
└── tests/
    └── test_brenus_flags.py     # Flag enforcement tests

crispro-front-end/
├── src/
│   ├── App.jsx                   # Main app + modular route architecture
│   ├── components/
│   │   ├── SyntheticLethality/   # SL Analyzer UI (primary CrisPRO surface)
│   │   ├── ClinicalDossier/      # Clinical dossier view
│   │   ├── ClinicalGenomicsCommandCenter/  # Genomics command center
│   │   ├── CoPilot/              # AI CoPilot (Q2C router, intents, LLM)

Frontend (React/MUI)
    │
